sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application No. 185 & 186 of 2017 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ___________________________________________________________ For hearing of main case. 14.01.2026 Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for applicant. Per learned counsel, the questions agitated in these references have been decided against the applicant / department by virtue of judgment reported as 2011 PTD 2042, therefore, he seeks that these references may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in the connected file. Judge Judge Ayaz P.S.
